summary: Classified the five hydrated open PRs independently as requested. No shared canonical was selected, no security-sensitive signal was present, and no close/merge/fix actions were planned because this inventory job disables instant close, low-signal closeout, merge, fix, and fix PR paths. Three useful narrow PRs should simply remain open in their own maintainer lanes; two PRs have specific maintainer/technical decisions remaining.

actions.reason: Keep open as an independent contributor fix for maintainer review; this job cannot merge or repair it.
Keep open as an independent Telegram/plugin SDK fix; maintainer review or branch refresh is outside this no-fix/no-merge inventory job.
Keep open as an independent docs clarification for maintainer review; no closure or merge is allowed by this job.
Maintainer/product and technical correctness judgment is required before this broad new plugin API can move forward.
Human review is needed to confirm the prior Codex P1 concern is resolved and decide whether the proof/merge gate is satisfied.

needs_human: #81164: Broad context-engine compaction API with compatibility/session-state/availability risk and source-level review blockers requires maintainer product and technical judgment.
